findings.description: Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:

findings.description: Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
findings.suggestedFix: Add a lang attribute to the <html> element (e.g., lang="en").

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The <html> element does not have a lang attribute

findings.description: Ensure the document has a main landmark
findings.suggestedFix: Add a <main> or role="main" landmark to the page.

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Document does not have a main landmark

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.suggestedFix: Add an <h1> element as the primary page heading.

findings.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.suggestedFix: Increase foreground/background contrast to at least 4.5:1 for normal text or 3:1 for large text.

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.84 (foreground color: #64748b, background color: #111422, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
